changeSet.author: Hoang Manh
Hoang Manh
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_GET_COPY_TRADING_MARKET_LEADER_LIST' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API';
